message:
feat(pld): add Prompt Lookup Decoding for zero-cost speculative drafting

Implement n-gram pattern matching on token history for zero-cost drafting:
- Add draftFromHistory() for CPU-based n-gram matching (0 SSD cost)
- Add speculativeDecodePLD() for PLD-based generation with batch verify
- Add --pld flag to benchmark for testing PLD mode
- Add --12balls flag to benchmark for VIP expert pre-caching
- Fix benchmark timing stats for PLD mode (skip per-token tracking)

This is the "13th ball" optimization: if drafting is free, we only pay
SSD tax once for verification instead of 6x for draft+verify.
